subcodes.title: Suriy-i-Sultan
subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of God, sent down in truth from the dominion of eternity, and God hath made them a testimony from His presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات الله قد نزلت بالحق من جبروت البقاء و جعلها الله حجه من عنده و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @martyrs and martyrdom, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
